programme.title: Season Of The Witch
programme.desc: A 14th-century Crusader returns to a homeland devastated by the Black Plague. A beleaguered church, deeming sorcery the culprit of the plague, commands the two knights to transport an accused witch to a remote abbey, where monks will perform a ritual in hopes of ending the pestilence. A priest, a grieving knight, a disgraced itinerant and a headstrong youth who can only dream of becoming a knight join a mission troubled by mythically hostile wilderness and fierce contention over the fate of the girl. When the embattled party arrives at the abbey, a horrific discovery jeopardises the knight's pledge to ensure the girl fair treatment, and pits them against an inexplicably powerful and destructive force.

programme.title: The Decline Of Western Civilization
programme.desc: Penelope Spheeris' The Decline Of Western Civilization is a riveting, unflinching and hard-core film which adeptly captures the spirit of a major cultural phenomenon. Including performances by X, Circle Jerks, Black Flag, Catholic Discipline, Germs and Alice Bag Band. Breaking down barriers of expression and social mores, the Decline punks were against everything: They gave birth to an anti-establishment view of the world that permeates today's music, politics, social attitudes, styles and trends. The film documents their deliberate reaction to the mass commercialism of music; it is a blatant and angry rejection of the mainstream. Burgeoning at the time, many of the punk bands first seen here have become legendary. The effect of the film on current day music, styles and trends is immeasurable.

programme.desc:
A rotating cast of local hosts from the Locked On Podcast Network guide you through each day in the National Hockey League with a collection of themed shows. Gil Martin gets started on Mondays by checking in with three of the network's local experts to chat about the biggest stories going on league-wide. Tuesday sees Mike DiStefano and Ross Levitan take stock of the Eastern Conference, followed by a Western Conference check-in on Wednesdays with Brett Holden and Jess Belmosto. Chris Micieli and Adam Denker present league Power Rankings every Thursday. Things wrap up on Fridays as DiBiase and Rachel Donner review the week that was and look ahead to the weekend slate of action in the NHL.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: S1E2 Skate
programme.desc: Watch the inspiring story of Mike Rogers, an all-around skateboarding star from Cocoa Beach, FL. A regular competitor at top events around the world, including the Vans Pro-Tec Pool Party, Vans Bowl-A-Rama at Bondi Beach, and the Clash at Clairemont, Mike showcases his skill, style, and dedication to the sport. The episode also features Leticia Bufoni and Cata Diaz as she shares her perspective on women in skateboarding and explains why MACBA in Barcelona has become a world-renowned destination for skaters, with its iconic plaza, unique architecture, and perfectly smooth concrete.

programme.title: S1E3 Skate
programme.desc: Experience the very best of GoPro skateboarding at MACBA, Barcelona, celebrated worldwide as the ultimate Spanish skateboarding mecca. In 2018, we teamed up with Macba Life to follow the local skating community and capture the most jaw-dropping tricks this iconic plaza has to offer. Don’t miss this unforgettable collaboration with #MacbaLife.

programme.title: S2E1 Skate
programme.desc: The very best of GoPro skateboarding including pro skateboarders Sean Malto, Chris Cole & Leticia Bufoni.

programme.title: S1E1 NHL After Dark
programme.desc: In this episode, NHL and GoPro team up to show the game from the perspective of some of hockey’s greatest players. On NHL After Dark, Detroit Red Wings forward Tomáš Tatar puts his street hockey skills to the test with challenging stickhandling drills. Pittsburgh Penguins center Evgeni Malkin, three-time Stanley Cup champion and 2012 Hart Memorial Trophy winner, showcases his smooth hands and technical mastery as he takes on drills that look simple but are far from easy. Chicago Blackhawks defender Duncan Keith elevates target practice to an art form while outmaneuvering his opponents with precision and speed.

programme.title: S1E2 NHL After Dark
programme.desc: In this episode, NHL and GoPro join forces to capture the game through the eyes of hockey’s best players. Vancouver Canucks duo Daniel and Henrik Sedin showcase their legendary on-ice chemistry through a series of unconventional drills. Philadelphia Flyers center Claude Giroux returns for his second episode, using lightning-fast hands and impressive physicality to outmaneuver his opponents. Colorado Avalanche forward Gabriel Landeskog powers through defenders and scores hard-hitting goals that put our cameras to the ultimate test. New Jersey Devils goalie Cory Schneider takes on unique drills that double the challenge and push his skills to the limit.
